nasb.text: And Judas, who was betraying Him, said, “Surely it is not I, Rabbi?” Jesus *said to him, “You have said it yourself.”

esv.text: Judas, who would betray him, answered, “Is it I, Rabbi?” He said to him, “You have said so.”

cnv.text: 那出賣耶穌的猶大說：“拉比，是我嗎？”他說：“這是你說的。”

ccb.text: 出卖耶稣的犹大问祂：“老师，是我吗？” 耶稣说：“你自己说了。”

csbs.text: 那出卖耶稣的犹大应声说：“拉比，不会是我吧？” 耶稣对他说：“你已经说了。”
